title: Splash Hits
company: watching them deliver high energy, big water entertainment to the greatest hits from the past few decades. A toe-tapping evening suitable for all the family, prepare to see a show that even Simon Cowell would say has got talent - Now That's What I Call Synchro 2026! We dare you not sing along...
